sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48249" key="qeopa/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-πάτωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n48249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">son of God</tr_>, title of Parthian kings, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">BMus.Cat.Coins Parthia</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:p.16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.16</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
